name: remove_gui_custom_commands
short_description: Remove one or more custom commands
full_help:
remove_gui_custom_commands

Description: 
Remove one or more custom commands

Syntax: 
remove_gui_custom_commands  [-quiet] [-verbose] <names>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <names>     name of one or more custom commands to remove

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
